SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SESSION.NAME: EOLExtendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This session is used for any ECU that needs to grant special privileges to a vehicle manufacturer's End of Line test tool. For example, an ABS module that normally exits to the defaultSession when vehicle speed is greater than a given value may maintain the EOLExtendedDiagnosticSession (despite the vehicle speed). Diagnostic session 40H shall be reserved only for use by End of Line test tools in assembly plants and shall be implemented only when needed to verify communication with an End of Line tester. This EOLExtendedDiagnosticSession shall grant access to all functionality (e.g., diagnostic services, privileges, input/output control, etc.) that is necessary during the assembly testing and shall contain a superset of the diagnostic functionality supported in the extendedDiagnosticSession (03H).

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DID.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

DID.NAME: Electric A/C Compressor High Voltage Supply

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Electric A/C Compressor High Voltage Supply

DID.NAME: Electric A/C Compressor Internal Power Device Temperature

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Electric A/C Compressor Internal Power Device Temperature
OTA Initiate Download Function in Progress

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: One or More OTA Preconditions Not Met

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Ignition Off Time Required Prior to Accepting InitateActivation of New OTA Software

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Validation Application Routine Not Executed This Session
OTA Over OVTP For Identification Only

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
2nd Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
2nd Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
3rd Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
3rd Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
4th Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
4th Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info

DID.NAME: In-Use OTA Command Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use OTA Command Signing Public Key Hash

DID.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash
All Preconditions To Enter Programming Session Via VSU/OTA Are Satisfied
Steering Pinsion Torque Out of Range
Engine RPM Too High (or Torque Available)
Ignition Status Or Vehicle Power Mode (VPM) Out Of Range
Brake Pedal Pressed Or Brake Torque Present
Park Brake Out of Range or Activation in Progress
Loop-Time overflow or scheduler idle time overflow Counter
Number Of Modules (ISO14229 compatibility - always set to 01h)
Boot Software Identifcation Data (Part no. of the bootloader)

DID.NAME: Number of a rapid discharge request

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Number of a rapid discharge request

DID.NAME: Snapshot data of a rapid discharge (request timing)

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Electric A/C Compressor High Voltage Supply

DID.NAME: Snapshot data of a rapid discharge (after 5 sec)

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Electric A/C Compressor High Voltage Supply

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Low voltage value is above 9V for 300ms <Fail> Low voltage is below 8.5v for 300 ms Time to change DTC status to "ACTIVE" is 5 sec. after this fail criteria is met.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Low voltage is under 16v for 300ms <Fail> Low voltage is above 16.5v for 300ms. Time to change DTC status to "ACTIVE" is 5 sec. after this fail criteria is met.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> COMM receives data other than Voltage: too low from INV 2 consecutive times. (INV detected High voltage > certain voltage ( 110 v )) <Fail> If ElCmprEnbl_B_Rq=1 AND COMM receives Voltage: too Low data from INV; Then IF COMM continues to receive Voltage: too Low data from INV for 5 sec, set DTC. (INV detected High voltage < certain voltage ( 100 v ))

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> COMM receives data other than Voltage: too high from INV 2 consecutive times. (INV detects HV < certain voltage ( 422 v )) <Fail> If ElCmprEnbl_B_Rq=1 AND COMM receives Voltage: too high data from INV; Then IF COMM continues to receive Voltage: too high data from INV for 5 sec, set DTC. (INV detected HV > certain voltage ( 477.3 v ))

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Both of the following conditions are met: -Power On reset required -Received data other than Voltage: abnormal from INV 2 consecutive times. <Fail> If ElCmprEnbl_B_Rq=1 AND COMM receives Voltage: abnormal data from INV; Then IF COMM continues to receive Voltage: abnormal data from INV for 5 sec, set DTC. (INV detects HV > certain voltage ( 650 v ))

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Both of the following conditions are met: - CPU Power on reset required - COMM received data other than Overload from INV 2 consecutive times. <Fail> COMM receives Overload data from INV for 500 ms. (INV detects High load status with low revolution continuous more than specified time ( 5 sec or 25 sec depending on Motor current))

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> If specified value updating in RAM to exchange between COMM-function and INV-function work correctly. <Fail> Any of the following conditions are met: COMM detects any of the following: If specified value updating in RAM to exchange between COMM-function and INV-function does not work well for 4 times.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> COMM detects any of the following: - COMM receives data other than Overheat Stop from INV 2 consecutive times. (INV detects IGBT Temp <= certain temperature ( 118C )) <Fail> COMM detects any of the following: -COMM receives Overheat Stop data from INV and detects INV has not automatically recovered for 5 sec after receipt of first Overheat Stop message. (INV detects IGBT Temp >= certain temperature 120C @ When the motor is stopped or 134C @ When the motor is rotating(Less than 500 seconds from startup) or 120C @ When the motor is rotating(500 seconds or more from startup) )

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Both of the following conditions are met: - CPU Power On reset required - COMM receives data other than Abnormal System Stop from INV 2 consecutive times. <Fail> COMM receives System Abnormal Stop data from INV for 500 ms. (INV detects the number of stops due to software overcurrent or start failure exceeds a specified value (5 times)).

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Resume normal CAN communication. <Fail> Bus is not activated for 5 sec.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Receive "EngineClimateData" (0x178) Message correctly. <Fail> Not receiving "EngineClimateData" (0x178) Message for 5 sec.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Compressor Motor does not stop (Normal Operation)

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Battery Energy Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Receive "Battery_Traction_1 (0x7A)" Message correctly. <Fail> Not receiving Battery_Traction_1 (0x7A) Message for 5 sec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Compressor Motor does not stop (Normal Operation)

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Receive " BodyInfo_4 Messages(0x242)" message correctly. <Fail> Not receiving "BodyInfo_4 Messages(0x242)" message for 5 sec.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Compressor Motor does not stop (Normal Operation)

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> All of the following conditions are met: - CPU Power On reset required and - COMM receives data other than Output line short from INV 2 consecutive times. - COMM receives data other than Output Line Open from INV 2 consecutive times. - COMM receives data other than Abnormal current detection from INV 2 consecutive times. <Fail> COMM receives Output line short data from INV for 500ms. (INV detects Current on Inverter Output Line > certain current 50A peak ) OR COMM receives Output line open data from INV for 500 ms. (INV detects Current on Inverter Output Line = 0A when PWM duty cycle > 0%; PWM On) OR COMM receives Abnormal current detection data from INV for 500 ms. (INV detects (Normal Operating Current 10A) > Current on Inverter Output Line > (Normal Operating Current + 10A) when PWM duty cycle = 0%; PWM Off)

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Both of the following conditions are met: -LV (12V) Power On reset required and -ROM / DataFlash / External Flash error is cleared. <Fail> COMM detects any of the following 3 times in a row: - ROM Error or - DataFlash Error or - External Flash Error
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ROM Error: Compressor Motor Stopped DataFlash / External Flash Error: Compressor Motor does not stop (Normal Operation)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ROM Error: A/C doesn't work DataFlash / External Flash Error: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: "System Voltage Low" = OFF (Normal Operation) and "System Voltage High" = OFF (Normal Operation) COMM is established with HPCM communication for 5s. -START: It is enabled in 5s after a "AC_ Compressor_Req"(0x410) message can be received correctly. -END: It is disabled just after "AC_Compressor_Req"(0x410) can't be received for 5s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: <Pass> Both of the following conditions are met: - CPU Power on Reset - COMM receives data other than Abnormal Thermistor from INV 2 consecutive times. <Fail> COMM receives Abnormal thermistor data from INV for 500 ms. (INV detects INV Temp > certain temperature 214C) or INV Temp < certain temperature -50C)

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_99AB did_981C did_981D did_484B did_FD00

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present
